message:
Fix beads detail modal with Portal rendering, add responsive graph sizing

Same stacking context bug as the BottomSheet: the beads detail modal
(Synapse Portal) rendered inside a FrankenContainer which applies CSS
transforms via NeuralPulse and FrankenGlitch, trapping the fixed-
position modal behind the graph canvas and other siblings.

Fix: Added the same Portal component pattern (createPortal to
document.body with mount guard) and wrapped the entire detail modal
in <Portal>. z-index raised to z-[9999] to guarantee it renders
above all other content including the site header (z-50) and
terminal overlay (z-100).

Close button: Replaced the rotated Binary icon with a proper X icon
for clearer affordance. The X rotates 90 degrees on hover, matching
the BottomSheet close button pattern. Replaced ExternalLink import
with X since ExternalLink was unused after the previous refactor.

Graph canvas responsiveness:
  - Added ResizeObserver on the graph container that updates the
    ForceGraph2D width/height when the container resizes (e.g.,
    window resize, sidebar toggle). Disconnects on cleanup.
  - Height fallback: containerRef.clientHeight || 600 prevents
    zero-height renders when the container hasn't been laid out yet
  - Container min-height raised from 600px to 650px for more
    breathing room on the graph visualization
  - renderGraph effect now also depends on d3Loaded state to prevent
    graph initialization before D3 force layout functions are
    available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
